key_events: KOSPI closed at 5,478.70 on April 1st, a significant 8.44% surge.
Market sentiment is cautiously optimistic as of April 2nd, driven by hopes for de-escalation in Middle East tensions.
Investors are closely watching the April 2nd session following the record-breaking rally on April 1st.
